parameters.name: ParamCard
parameters.description: Reusable card that receives all content through props and params — analogous to an Ignition Perspective embeddable view with view.params. Compose it inside acg.view.embed and pass params: { title, subtitle, meta, variant } to customize each instance independently.

title.description: Card heading — bind to {{ params.title }} when embedded

meta.description: Small metadata line (timestamp, author, type, etc.)

variant.description: CSS variant class: primary | secondary | warning | danger

parameters.template:
{{ title }}
{{ #subtitle }}
{{ subtitle }}
{{ /subtitle }}{{ #meta }}
{{ meta }}
{{ /meta }}
{{ slot:default }}
